title: Replace Mod
description: Enable, Break, Replace, three easy steps to replace a block you don't like with the block in your off hand!
body:
# Replace Mod
![Showcases the functionality of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20Ye2QV6/images/375d847fd06dea116c081dbf4b22164bcd71e1a8.gif)

With this mod, building becomes easy. Any blocks you've placed that you feel would be better off with another block now suddently becomes so much easier as now you just gotta follow these simple steps:
- Enable
- Break
- Replace

With steps this easy, you could replace a whole beach from sand to red sand or an oak wall to spruce, the possibilities are endless!

The full steps to make work is to enable replace mode (press "R"), put the block you want to replace the current block with in your off hand, and break the block you want to replace.

If you want a version with an enchantment and less over powered, get the Replace Enchantment mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/replace-enchantement)!
